name: salesforce-skills
description: End-to-end Salesforce architecture, implementation, debugging, integration, and cross-cloud guidance for platform, Agentforce, Data Cloud, Marketing Cloud, and MuleSoft scenarios.

interface.shortDescription: Architecture, security, deployment, integrations, debugging, and cross-cloud guidance for Salesforce
interface.longDescription: Use Salesforce Skills for Apex, LWC, Flow, integrations, security, deployment, DevOps, limits, async design, data modeling, durable Salesforce memory, Agentforce, Data Cloud, Marketing Cloud, MuleSoft, Experience Cloud, Commerce, CPQ, Field Service, CRM Analytics, Revenue Cloud, Heroku, Slack, Industry Clouds, Nonprofit Cloud, Health Cloud, Financial Services Cloud, Education Cloud, and scalable multi-system architecture.
defaultPrompt: Design a scalable Salesforce and integration architecture for this requirement.
Debug this Salesforce issue across Apex, Flow, security, or async behavior.
Help model this data, choose platform components, and plan deployment across Salesforce clouds.
